meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stalls
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver faster, high-value results.
content.answer_block: You are stalling because your projects lack a structured path to value. By implementing a focused, automated user onboarding sequence, you force project clarity and reduce scope creep. Use Antigravity to scaffold the flow and Claude Code to execute the implementation, transforming vague requirements into a production-ready, high-converting feature set.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your client's deadline looms like a storm cloud. You have the skills, yet the project feels stuck in a perpetual state of 'almost done.' This isn't a failure of talent; it's a failure of structure. Without a clear path to value, your code wanders, features bloat, and the finish line retreats into the fog.

But there is a bridge out of this cycle. User onboarding is the architect's secret weapon. By focusing on the first five minutes of the user experience, you define exactly what the application must do, stripping away the non-essential and forcing a clean, ship-ready architecture. Let's turn that paralysis into a launch.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single feature that provides value to the user. This anchors your development and prevents scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project scope. Identify the single core value proposition and outline a 3-step onboarding flow that leads the user directly to that value.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a user_onboarding_logic.md file outlining the 3-step flow identified by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding State
steps.description: Create a robust state machine to track onboarding progress, ensuring users never get lost in the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state machine configuration for an onboarding flow with states: welcome, preferences, integration, and complete.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the state machine in src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts using the generated schema.'

steps.title: Build the Interactive UI
steps.description: Construct clean, modular UI components that guide the user without overwhelming them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create accessible, modular React components for an onboarding wizard. Include a progress indicator and a 'skip' function.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the UI components in src/components/onboarding/ and integrate them into the main layout.'

steps.title: Implement Persistent Progress
steps.description: Ensure the user's progress is saved so they can return exactly where they left off, increasing retention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a database schema and API endpoint to persist onboarding state per user ID.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the Prisma schema and the corresponding API handler for updating onboarding_status.'

steps.title: Automated Testing for Flow
steps.description: Verify the onboarding flow works under all conditions to ensure a bug-free first impression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright test cases covering the happy path and the 'skip' path of the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create tests/onboarding.spec.ts and run the test suite to verify the implementation.'

pro_tips: Never build an onboarding flow that requires more than three clicks to reach the core value.
Use 'ghost content' or skeletons during onboarding to give the illusion of speed while data fetches.
Trigger onboarding based on user behavior (e.g., inactivity) rather than just on first login.
Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing users through tutorials they don't want is the fastest way to lose them.
Monitor drop-off rates at each step of your onboarding flow to identify where your UI is confusing.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a user test with a colleague, and iterate on the drop-off points before your client launch.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop stalling and start shipping. Every line of code you write today brings your client closer to success and you closer to your next payout. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
